prompt: Create a realistic sports broadcast still photo from a 2024 KBO League baseball game, shot from the spectator seats in bright daylight with shallow depth of field. The main subject is a young female fan seated in the stands wearing a white Lotte Giants baseball jersey with navy piping, red-and-navy “Giants” chest lettering, a circular Lotte Giants Busan 1982 sleeve patch, and small Korean sponsor text on the sleeve; she has long dark hair tied in a ponytail, layered delicate necklaces, and her face is intentionally covered by a centered opaque rectangular privacy blur in a muted gray-brown gradient. Behind her are stadium seats and another fan wearing a white Giants jersey with red sleeves and a blue lanyard, softly out of focus. Add a black TV broadcast scoreboard overlay in the upper-left corner with exactly 2 team rows labeled 두산 and 롯데, scores 3 and 2, inning marker 7, a small baseball diamond graphic with one orange base highlighted, count text “2-2 0U,” pitcher line “P 김택연,” pitch count “12,” and bottom batter information “6 윤동희 3타수 0안타.” Use authentic Korean baseball broadcast styling, natural camera perspective, realistic fabric texture, accurate stadium lighting, documentary photography look, and a slightly compressed telephoto crop.
